title: Deep Learning, Computer Vision and NLP Course
description: Training-focused course covering deep learning fundamentals, neural networks, CNNs, RNNs, computer vision, image classification, transfer learning, object detection, OCR, NLP basics, text preprocessing, word embeddings, text classification, clustering, sentiment analysis, NER, translation, text generation, and chatbot basics.

title: Data Analysis for Machine Learning
description: Comprehensive data analysis techniques for machine learning applications, covering data preprocessing, visualization, and feature engineering.

title: AI Track
description: Focused on Artificial Intelligence concepts, Python-based ML models, and data analysis.

title: Automotive Embedded Systems Course
description: Introduction to AUTOSAR, CAN protocols, and automotive safety standards.

title: Embedded Systems Diploma
description: Covered microcontrollers, C programming, microcontroller architecture, and real-time systems.
